steps.title: Track who sees red
steps.content: The passage says red is associated with power and dominance and can make people respond with caution and hesitation. In home matches, opposing players would see Manchester United's red uniforms.

steps.title: Apply the effect to opponents
steps.content: Choice A invents excitement for Manchester United players, Choice C shifts to fans, and Choice D wrongly makes the uniform harm Manchester United's own skill. The predicted caution would most likely hurt opposing players' performance. The answer is B.
